{{Quote|The Bane Back Spider is a gift to the Spider Clan. Its viciousness is a match for our own.|A [[Spiderclan/Legends|Spiderclan]] web dancer|<ref name="SWG:P18" />}}
The '''Bane Back spider''' was a subtype of [[gaping spider]], an [[Spider/Legends|arachnid]] creature native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]].<ref name="SWG:TTE" /> A [[Mutant|mutated]] variant,<ref name="SWG:P18" /> this creature was larger, stronger and more resistant to average gaping spider.<ref name="SWG:TTE" />

==History==
{{Quote|It was 50 meters tall! It had fangs growing out of it's back! Its back ridges were razor sharp! I only survived because of my lucky thermal detonator!|[[Geeot Nuetia]]|<ref name="SWG:P18" />}}
The existence of the Bane Back spider was first reported during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. An individual by the name [[Geeot Nuetia]] encountered such creature during a [[Hunting/Legends|hunting]] trip on Dathomir after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. He later claimed in the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] newspaper ''[[Coronet Gossip]]'' that a 50-meter tall Bane Back spider attacked him and pretended that he killed it with a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]]. Later, a [[Journalist/Legends|journalist]] went to Dathomir to investigate the creature but only found 2-3 meters tall spiders.<ref name="SWG:P18" />

Then, in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> adventurous [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] traveled to Dathomir in order to hunt Bane Back spiders. The creatures were known to have been seen near the [[Nightspider Cult cave|Spider Clan Cave]].<ref name="SWG:TTE" /> After killing a spider, one of the spacer later used a carapace as a trophy.<ref name="SWG:TTE" /><ref name="SWG:TC">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Trophy Creatures}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Bane Back spiders appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:TTE" /> prior to the [[Star Wars video games|game's]] closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Bane Back spiders were added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 18 Notes for 15 Jun 2005|Publish 18]]," released on [[June 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 18.0">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=archive%202005#june|text=Publish 18.0}}</ref>
